annotations.note: Mathlib has the purely algebraic `Module.IsReflexive` (bijection to double dual as R-modules) but no analytic reflexive locally convex TVS class using the strong bidual topology.

annotations.label: Strong dual

annotations.note: `StrongDual 𝕜 E := E →SL[σ] 𝕜` is Mathlib's continuous dual with the strong (operator-norm) topology in the normed setting.

annotations.note: `NormedSpace.inclusionInDoubleDual` is the canonical evaluation map into the double strong dual (as a bounded linear map); the algebraic version is `Module.Dual.eval`.
